characters.name: Donnie Banks
characters.description: Donnie Banksis a DEA agent who was assigned to live inGraceland. He was working undercover with his partner,Lauren Kincaidto purchase drugs from the RussianVzakonyecrime family. He was removed from the house after a bad drug deal in which he was shot. He later was transferred to Miami. He was working undercover with his partner,Lauren Kincaidto purchase drugs from the RussianVzakonyecrime family.
characters.personality_section: He was working undercover with his partner,Lauren Kincaidto purchase drugs from the RussianVzakonyecrime family.

characters.name: Sam Campbell
characters.description: Sam Campbellis an FBI Deputy Director based in Washington, DC. Campbell addressedMike Warren's graduating class of new FBI agents. He impressed upon them that they "will make mistakes, they will not be perfect and they will fail". But he also told them that he hopes they "have the brains and the luck to survive" their failures. Campbell is also the agent who tells Mike the true nature of his assignment atGraceland: Mike is there to investigateBriggs.

characters.name: Cassandra
characters.description: CassandraActor:Ciera Payton— First Appearance: "Goodbye High"  — # Episodes: "0episodes"  Cassandra is a nurse in a local hospital. She and Dale have a tenuous relationship. Dale told her that with the life he lives working undercover it wouldn't make for a good family.

characters.name: Catherine DeMarco
characters.description: Catherine 'Charlie DeMarcois a strong-willed and compassionate agent featured inGraceland. She is portrayed byVanessa Ferlitoin all three seasons. She's a chameleon on the job, easily turning herself into anything from a believable junkie to a classy businesswoman. Whatever her guise, she's brimming with attitude and determined to take the bad guys down. characters.name: Roberto Ganzia
characters.description: Roberto GanziawasBriggs' FBI training officer and was assigned to live and work inThe Estate. Roberto Ganzia was working deep undercover with Briggs on theCaza Cartel. He was working from the Mexican side to bring down the cartel.

characters.name: Dale Jakes
characters.description: Dale 'DJ' Jakesis a quick-tempered U.S. Customs Agent inGraceland. He is portrayed byBrandon Jay McLarenin all three seasons. Dale JakesReal NameDale JakesAlias(es)DJCrazy Jakes(byGraceland Agents)Chocolate Jesus(byJohnny)Sunshine(byJohnny)Lancelot(byJohnny)Physical descriptionGenderMaleHairBlackEyesBrownHeight5'9 (1.75m)Biographical InformationStatusAliveSocial lifeCitizenshipUSAOccupationUndercover U.S. Customs agentAffiliationGracelandICEFamilyCassandra(ex-partner)Daniel(son)RomancesCassandra(former)Courtney(lover)Series InformationSeason(s)1,2,3,NextlandEpisode count36First seenLast seenPilotNo Old Tigers+NextlandPortrayed byBrandon Jay McLaren He is the most territorial of the roommates. What's his is his, and he'll make sure everyone knows it. He's a tough nut to crack, but underneath his shell is a truly dedicated agent with a lot of wisdom. Jakes is a bit of a lone wolf, but he is always there to help the team when they're in need.

characters.name: Quinn
characters.description: QuinnActor:Arturo Rossi— First Appearance: "O-Mouth"  — # Episodes: "0episodes"  InHappy Endings, Charlie & Cortes visited Quinn as "Katie" and "Rafael" to convince him to help get back the millions of dollarsOdinstole fromBellousingJanglesas bait. He's skeptical because he doesn't want Jangles to come after him. ByPawn, Quinn is fearful that Jangles is after him. He calls Briggs for help in getting him out of the country. Briggs provides him with a fake passport with the name Anthony Busca. What Quinn doesn't realize is that Briggs is setting him up as a pawn and that the FBI thinks "Anthony Busca" isOdin Rossi.

characters.name: Carlos Bonilla
characters.description: Carlos BonillaActor:Raheem Babalola— First Appearance: "Goodbye High"  — # Episodes: "1"  Derek is a former gang member. He left after getting shot twice in the chest in a drive-by. He thinks he should have died. After he was shot, he woke up in a hospital in El Paso, Texas and fell in love with nurse,Cassandra.
characters.personality_section: Derek is a former gang member. He left after getting shot twice in the chest in a drive-by. He thinks he should have died. After he was shot, he woke up in a hospital in El Paso, Texas and fell in love with nurse,Cassandra.

characters.name: Mike Warren
characters.description: Michael 'Mike' Warrenis the protagonist and primary agent featured inGraceland. He is portrayed byAaron Tveitin all three seasons. Mike is relentlessly driven, with ambitions to become FBI Director fast. He is an overachiever and a workaholic who thinks of little else. Very little is known about his life before Quantico. And he gets uncomfortable discussing personal matters. He often lies for no reason. Because of this distrust, he takes on the workload of an entire team. His secretive nature leads to Charlie calling him unsentimental and several other roommates planning his death. However, he tries to forgive even the most heinous acts committed against him. Only when he's under duress will he show his true feelings. After Paige contracted Sid Markham to kill him, Mike claimed to have forgiven her. However, during his struggle with withdrawals, he begged her not to touch him. He will also take petty revenge against minor wrongdoings. Ever since Jakes ranted at him about not eating his food, Mike has gone out of his way to do so. When Mike isn't working, he often plays sports with Johnny and gets up to mischief with him. He enjoys American football, frisbee and his new favourite, surfing. And while he is good at golf, he resents it and will only play if forced to. His parents expected him to play it professionally. Mike admitted to Johnny that refusing to was rebellion. Mike is a fidgeter and daydreamer. Plus, his mix of ruthless determination and suspicion makes him look paranoid. Mike eventually struggles with the trauma of everything he has endured, turning to Oxycodone for help.
